candidate_definition_hints.text: This repository has been archived. In 2024, Microsoft Learn shifted to a new feedback submission and management model, which is described in [Announcing a new way to give feedback on Microsoft Learn](https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/blog/microsoftlearnblog/announcing-a-new-wa…
